title_en: Larger Numbers, Direction, and Going Somewhere
petrov_stage: Stretch the language into larger numbers, direction, and destination statements.
petrov_mission: Say where you want to go and combine a larger number with a place or direction line.
focus_targets: Hundreds and thousands use 百 and 千
Directional verbs 去 and 来

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 非常好, 百, 零, 千.
Listen to a line that uses Hundreds and thousands use 百 and 千 and 零 fills missing place values and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 非常好, 百, 零, 千.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Hundreds and thousands use 百 and 千 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Say where you want to go and combine a larger number with a place or direction line.
Say in Chinese: I want to go to China.

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 非常好, 百, 零, 千, 钱.
Translate into Chinese: Which country have you been to?
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 非常好, 百, 零.
Produces one correct spoken line using Hundreds and thousands use 百 and 千.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
